hccd87c38gc347g477eg8dc9ga519b6ca9162: A red dragon! I envy its knight - would that I rode such a steed.
h357daeacg77b8g4b32ga46cg28562aa01451: A crèche must be near. Come - my kin await.
h5cc912e8g0a15g4562g9fd6g426dadab6357: They may be kin - but they look dangerous. Stay back.
h73396dbfg3f49g4f00gbc81ga19e9413f66d: These githyanki look dangerous. Stay back.
h3d1d5defg4be1g4cb0g9990g001108e29709: Nonsense. They will lead us to the cure we seek.
ha740cabegd324g4cc0ga112g79a557230198: The dragon incinerated those soldiers - surely this isn't safe?
h4fa9df1agb430g490bg9adfgb664b37e991d: The dragons serve githyanki, kin; it will do us no harm.
h0c2ec466g094dg40c3gb378g91e6e648cd32: The dragons serve githyanki; I'll see it does you no harm.
he3fd6496ga385g431ag8b59gf3df34b768aa: Follow me. We are close to the cure we seek.
hf456cde5g7357g496eg9b21g72402db198b6: And we'll just pat the dragon on the head, I suppose?
